/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/IoT_Server_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/TCPSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/UDPSocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/ServerChannel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IoT_Server.dir/IoT_Server_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o IoT_Server  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
